sources.claim: Global PQC market estimated at USD 1,584.9M in 2025, reaching USD 2,177.6M in 2026, projected to USD 20,545.5M by 2033 at 37.8% CAGR
NIST finalized FIPS 203 (ML-KEM), FIPS 204 (ML-DSA), FIPS 205 (SLH-DSA) on August 13, 2024 — first official post-quantum cryptography standards after 8-year competition
Three enacted US federal statutes underpin PQC mandates; Trump March 2026 Cyber Strategy explicitly mandates PQC; TLS 1.3 PQC deadline Jan 2, 2030; CNSA 2.0 NSS migration deadline 2030
NXP, Thales, AWS, Palo Alto Networks, and IDEMIA are top 5 market players; collectively ~59-70% combined market share
PQShield raised $63M+; SandboxAQ raised $300M+ in Dec 2024 at $5.75B valuation; Quantinuum raised $600M from Nvidia-led investors at $10B valuation
Enterprises face Q-Day risk window 2028–2032 based on recent quantum hardware advances; 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks confirmed active; enterprise migrations take 5–15 years depending on size

sources.publisher: Quantum Gate AE / Global Government Transitions
sources.claim: UAE issued binding National Encryption Policy in late 2025 requiring mandatory 2026 migration plan submissions — first government with binding near-term deadline. EU ENISA Roadmap published June 2025 with 2026/2030/2035 milestones.
PQShield named to UK Tech Nation Future Fifty 2026; company provides hardware/software PQC IP for semiconductor vendors and government agencies
PQC market projected to reach USD 10,806.9M by 2032; BFSI sector holds leading 28% market share in 2026 explicitly mandated to secure high-value transactions; hardware commands 52% share

Migration timelines: 5–7 years for small enterprises, 8–12 for medium, 12–15+ for large. Realistic deadline arithmetic means 2026 start is the minimum viable timeline for large enterprises to meet 2030 federal mandates.

unverified_claims.note: Estimated from search trend momentum data and category size; no direct Ahrefs/SEMrush source available — treat as directional
2021 baseline interpolated by back-calculating from CAGR figures across multiple market reports; exact 2021 figure not directly cited
Derived from annual CAGR applied to quarterly period with acceleration adjustment for new mandate announcements; no direct quarterly market report found

unverified_claims.claim: Environmental: lattice-based PQC requires 2–4x more CPU cycles per operation than RSA-2048
unverified_claims.note: Directional estimate from academic benchmarking papers; exact multiplier varies by algorithm, implementation, and hardware — no single authoritative source

unverified_claims.claim: Market shares for NXP (~22%), Thales (~18%), AWS (~15%) are approximate
unverified_claims.note: MarketsandMarkets confirms combined share of ~60% for top 5 players; individual shares estimated proportionally from company revenue and product footprint data — not directly cited
